description_long: This is a well-worn, heavy-duty wrench with a robust, metallic construction and a long, cylindrical handle. The handle is dark brown with visible rust and wear, suggesting extensive use and exposure to the elements. The head of the wrench is a lighter, silvery-gray metal, showing signs of oxidation and grime, and features a fixed jaw design. The transition between the handle and the head is marked by a change in color and texture, with the head appearing bulkier and more complex in shape. The surface of the wrench is rough and matte, with patches of corrosion and discoloration, especially along the handle. No visible brand markings or logos are present, and the handle lacks any distinct grip pattern.
description: A weathered, metallic wrench with a rusted brown handle and a bulky, silvery-gray fixed jaw head. The surface is rough and shows significant wear and corrosion.
description_view_0: The wrench is seen at an angle, highlighting the transition from the rusted handle to the bulky, light-colored head.
description_view_1: The head of the wrench is most prominent, showing its rounded, fixed jaw and the top surface's wear.
description_view_2: The wrench is viewed from the opposite side, emphasizing the length of the handle and the side profile of the head.
description_view_3: A side view that accentuates the straightness of the handle and the thickness of the head, with rust and wear visible along the handle.
attribute_rust_or_wear_marks: Significant rust and wear marks are visible along the handle and at the transition to the head, with moderate corrosion on the head.
